The real challenge

Your CRM is full of data.
Your results don't show it.

Home & DIY retail has six structural problems that prevent CRM from delivering results — and most teams don't know which one is bleeding them most.

70%+

Customers research items online but complete their purchases in-store—and you have no way to track it.

Most furniture purchase decisions begin online but are completed in-store—with zero attribution. Your best customer walked through your door last week, and you have no idea they had been browsing your e-shop for three months beforehand.

3–5 yrs

Low frequency of shopping. One wrong moment can cost you a customer.

The average Home & DIY customer buys major items every 3–5 years. If you miss the trigger — a move, a renovation, a new baby — your competitor wins the lifetime value. Without predictive segmentation, you're always guessing.

40–60%

of retail databases contain duplicates, expired consents, POS errors, or unreachable contacts.

Data audits consistently reveal a significant share of customer data is flawed—silently undermining campaign performance. Every email sent to these records harms deliverability, reduces engagement, and ultimately erodes real revenue.

Q3–Q4

is peak renovation season — and most CRM teams are still on autopilot.

Q4 consistently sees the highest per-household home improvement spend of the year, as customers shift indoors — kitchens, bathrooms, furnishings. Without automated nurture flows triggered by seasonal signals, you're running manual campaigns during the most valuable window of the year. (HIRI, 2024)

1 list, 3 buyers

You're sending the same newsletter to people who couldn't be more different.

The weekend DIY enthusiast. The professional interior designer. The young family furnishing their first apartment. One segment, three completely different journeys, buying motivations, and price points. One newsletter serves none of them well.

€X

You can't prove CRM ROI — so management won't invest more.

"Without attribution from email to in-store visits, decisions default to gut feel. If you can't show that a newsletter drove €X in-store revenue last quarter, the CRM budget stays flat—or gets cut."

Join the webinar to learn more

How we delivered it

Forensic Data Audit

Recovered dormant contacts, rebuilt consent layer, unified POS + e-shop + loyalty

AI Segmentation Engine (Category Heat Score)

91 segments across 13 product families — live, real-time

Proven Automated Use Cases

Welcome flows, abandoned cart recovery, post-visit re-engagement, win-back sequences. Content journeys replaced volume blasts — −50% emails, +200% revenue.

Cross-Channel Attribution

Email → in-store visit → cash register. Proved ROI to every store manager.

Direct Mail + Digital Orchestration

Physical mail coordinated from CDP. Attribution against online behaviour.

Solution

You know the problem.
Here's how we fix it — step by step.

Each of the pain points above has a proven solution. These are the 9 use cases we deploy on Bloomreach — in the order that generates ROI fastest. Start wherever you are.

DMT — A Full Digital Maturity Audit

Run by AI, Delivered in Days Not Months

The Digital Maturity Test is an autonomous AI agent that scans your e-commerce ecosystem and evaluates it against key benchmarks: reaction times, personalization, abandoned-cart recovery, reactivation, and the use cases your competitors already run. You get a direct benchmark against competitors — a report that once took months and six figures. Within a week, you'll know where you're losing revenue and what to fix first.

Start here

Business Analysis

The Readiness Check Paying for Itself Before You Sign

Most CDP projects fail because the business case is guessed, not built. We don't guess. Our readiness check audits your processes, IT stack, marketing operations, apps, and data sources — then models your real CDP potential, impact, and timeline. You get a phased plan, realistic expectations, and a license-cost projection aligned with your growth — not a sales quota. The result: you go to your board with defensible numbers, not a vendor pitch, and know your ROI before you spend an euro.

Business Plan

Forensic Data Audit

Recovering "Leaky Bucket" = Thousands of contacts

Every brand has a leaky bucket — over-suppressed, mis-flagged, or lost contacts trapped in legacy tools. We trace every PII and data entry point, identify the leaks, and return recovered contacts to circulation — fully GDPR-compliant. The result is a double-digit growth in your active, addressable base. It's like a free acquisition campaign — except these customers already know your brand and are ready to be reactivated from day one. Your CDP starts paying for itself before it's fully deployed.

Data Quality

The AI Segmentation Engine

Micro-Segments That Convert 5–10× Better Than Mass Sends

Most segmentation is just demographic slicing. Ours is engineered — combining multiple data layers, behavioral signals, and industry-tuned scoring. It distinguishes real intent: from one-off buyers to repeat customers, from price-sensitive shoppers to planners. The result is high-converting micro-segments for hyper-relevant communication. You stop blasting your base and start running hundreds of targeted, high-margin campaigns at once.

Segmentation

Real-Time AI Recommendations

From Segment to Individual, Across Every Channel

We generate real-time recommendations for content, assortment, and products — for every segment and individual — adapting to each customer's journey. We feed them directly into your omnichannel orchestration, selecting the best channel by cost or engagement. The result is higher conversion, lower communication costs, and no wasted emails when a free push will do.

Recommendation

AI Content Generation at Audience Scale

No Production Bottleneck

Every segment and individual gets content tailored to their profile — automatically.
Optimized feeds, AI-generated creative, and channel-aware copy. You stop producing dozens of variants manually. The framework delivers them on-brand and on-time, so your team can run 10× more campaigns without burnout or extra hires.

Automation

3-Level Frequency Layers

Push 3–5× More Campaigns Without Spiking Unsubscribes

Frequency is king. But push too hard, and your base burns. Our 3-tier frequency system maximizes relevance and conversion pressure while built-in health checks protect the long-term value of every contact. You get to run aggressive campaign calendars without watching your unsubscribe rate climb. It's the only way to monetize your base hard and keep it alive five years from now.

Timing

Campaign & CRM Analytics

Powered by Bloomreach + Looker

End the attribution debate. Every campaign, every program, every segment, every channel — visible, comparable, defensible. Marketing decisions backed by the same data your CFO trusts. No more "I think this worked." Just numbers, cohorts, and incremental revenue you can point to.

Analytics

Catchment-Area Segmentation

Your Stores Are an Untapped Revenue Channel

Retail stores isn't legacy — it's logistics, trust, and impulse, all in one. We map your entire customer base by distance to each branch, build catchment-aware segments, and incentivize the in-store journey with offers customers actually act on (because "see it, try it, take it home today" still wins). It results real lift in walk-ins, visit rates, and click & collect — and an online-offline revenue loop that finally makes the ROPO effect work for you instead of against you.

Online-offline revenue

Direct Mail

The Channel Everyone Wrote Off, Quietly Outperforming Email for Specific Segments

Print isn't dead. For an entire — and growing — segment of customers (defined by age, by digital fatigue, by preference), the printed mailbox still converts at rates that put email to shame. We have the case studies. The revenue is real, recurring, and incremental. And in a world where every brand is fighting for the same inbox, the mailbox is suddenly the least crowded room.

Omnichannel
